title: Sree Indilayappan Temple
tagline: Sree Indilayappan Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Marayikkodu Sree Indilayappan Kshethram (മലയാളം:ഇണ്ടിളയപ്പൻ ക്ഷേത്രം, മാരായിക്കോട്) is a 1500-year-old Hindu temple in South India.
overview.description: Marayikkodu Sree Indilayappan Kshethram (മലയാളം:ഇണ്ടിളയപ്പൻ ക്ഷേത്രം, മാരായിക്കോട്) is a 1500-year-old Hindu temple in South India. Non-Hindus are permitted in the temple. It is in Karickom, 5 km from Kottarakara.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vettikkavala
topPlaces.description: Vettikkavala is a village located in the Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India. The village is famous for Shiva-Vishnu temples which hosts a special deity called Vathukkal Njaali Kunju.

topPlaces.name: Padinjaretheruvu
topPlaces.description: Padinjaretheruvu is one of the main village of the outskirts of Kottarakkara town, which is 0.5 kilometres (0.31 mi) west of Kizhekketheruvu on the National Highway 208 (NH 208), in Kollam District, Kerala state, India.

topPlaces.name: Thrikkannamangal
topPlaces.description: Thrikkannamangal is a village located in the tehsil of Kottarakara in the Kollam district of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Malankara Pentecostalism
topPlaces.description: Malankara Pentecostalism originally known as Malankara Poorna Suvisesha Sabha is the first Pentecostal movement in Kerala, India which gave birth to many Pentecostal denominations in Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kottarakkara Sree Mahaganapathi Kshethram
topPlaces.description: Kottarakkara Sree Mahaganapathy Temple is a Hindu temple in Kottarakkara in the Indian state of Kerala. Though the central deity is Shiva, the temple is known for the shrine of Shiva's son Ganesha (Mahaganapathy).

topPlaces.name: Kottarakkara
topPlaces.description: Kottarakkara (IAST: Koṭṭārakkara), also transliterated as Kottarakara, is a town and municipality in the Kollam district of Kerala, India. Kottarakkara lies 27 kilometres (17 mi) to the east of Kollam city centre.

topPlaces.name: Chakkuvarakkal
topPlaces.description: Chakkuvarakkal is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Melila, Kollam
topPlaces.description: Melila is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India situated along the Pathanapuram - Thiruvananthapuram Sabari Bypass road. The nearest NH, National Highway 744 (India) is at Kunnicode.

items.note: Vettikkavala is a village located in the Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India. The village is famous for Shiva-Vishnu temples which hosts a special deity called Vathukkal Njaali Kunju.

Padinjaretheruvu is one of the main village of the outskirts of Kottarakkara town, which is 0.5 kilometres (0.31 mi) west of Kizhekketheruvu on the National Highway 208 (NH 208), in Kollam District, Kerala state, India.

Malankara Pentecostalism originally known as Malankara Poorna Suvisesha Sabha is the first Pentecostal movement in Kerala, India which gave birth to many Pentecostal denominations in Kerala.

Kottarakkara Sree Mahaganapathy Temple is a Hindu temple in Kottarakkara in the Indian state of Kerala. Though the central deity is Shiva, the temple is known for the shrine of Shiva's son Ganesha (Mahaganapathy).

Kottarakkara (IAST: Koṭṭārakkara), also transliterated as Kottarakara, is a town and municipality in the Kollam district of Kerala, India. Kottarakkara lies 27 kilometres (17 mi) to the east of Kollam city centre.
Chakkuvarakkal is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

Melila is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India situated along the Pathanapuram - Thiruvananthapuram Sabari Bypass road. The nearest NH, National Highway 744 (India) is at Kunnicode.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sree Indilayappan Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sree Indilayappan Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sree Indilayappan Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (58 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (58 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sree Indilayappan Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sree Indilayappan Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sree Indilayappan Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sree Indilayappan Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sree Indilayappan Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vettikkavala, Padinjaretheruvu, Thrikkannamangal, Malankara Pentecostalism, Kottarakkara Sree Mahaganapathi Kshethram.
